title: fallacy-cutter decision.json — v1
description: A citable gate decision. The payload fields (question, metric, decision, ...) are the experiment's own; the _harness_provenance block is the machine-checkable part this schema freezes. A document that fails this schema is INVALID unconditionally, regardless of its numbers.

written_by.description: The only sanctioned writer. Any other value is a bypass.

harness_version.description: SHA256 over the sorted per-file SHA256 digests of the top-level gate_harness/*.py sources present at run time. A verifier recomputes this against the harness it trusts; mismatch means the harness changed since the run and the decision must be re-run.

evaluation_oracle_ran.description: May be false only if no evaluation entrypoints exist; a verifier MAY treat false as a reason to refuse.

construction_may_be_tautological.description: Harness-only flag; the experiment cannot set or clear it.

classification_success_depends_on_harnes.description: Harness-only flag; true means an evaluation call site received a ground-truth hint.
